content:
A simple Git flow that works for Agile development
The flow:
Creating a new release branch for every sprint.
Merge all the development branches into the sprint release branch, then do the tests.
Merge the branches which passed the tests into the main branch.
Remove and create a new one for the next sprint.
summary: A simple Git flow that works for Agile development
title: A Git flow for Agile development

content:
My current publishing flow:
Write the content on Logseq Export the content to Hugo markdown format Build and deploy the blog with GitHub action
title: My publishing workflow

content:
Hi! I’m Ha, and I’m a software engineer. For much of my career, I have focused on technologies to help build startups. I’m passionate about creating beautiful minimal apps and services that people love.
I believe that writing is an excellent way to help us to think, learn and understand. That’s why in this blog, I try to explain technical problems and solutions with simple words and code.
summary: Hi! I’m Ha, and I’m a software engineer.
title: About
